_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 1-dependent alterations in mouse microglia function are not cell-intrinsic.

_contextSnippet: there was a large number of differentially expressed proteins between male WT and Nf1± microglia (2474)...Hierarchical clustering of normalized intensities...led to a clear separation into male and female, as well as WT and Nf1± subclusters
details: Successfully identified 2474 differentially expressed proteins between male WT and Nf1± microglia, with clear hierarchical clustering separation between groups
